title: indigofera pungens
intro: Indigofera pungens, also known as prickly indigo, is a plant species within the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Indigofera pungens include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Indigofera pungens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional medicine.
